Package javadraw.ui

Class ToggleButton

java.lang.Object
javadraw.ui.Component
javadraw.ui.ToggleButton
All Implemented Interfaces:
CustomRenderable, DrawableObject, MultiRenderableMember
Direct Known Subclasses:
CheckBox, RadioButton
public abstract class ToggleButton extends Component
